goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
next_focus: NEXT TASK SCOPED: ai/tasks/task-0128.md (B11 provider-neutral billing subscription & plan lifecycle) — replaces the PR #209 stopgap with real plan-driven entitlements; human-independent (manual/provider-neutral, no Stripe creds), precursor to B6+U7. Just shipped PR #209 fix(billing): free-tier default entitlements (limit.projects=3/environments=3/members=5 on not_found) — root cause was that billing has ONLY read handlers, upsertEntitlement is never called, and no subscription/plan-assignment exists, so every new org was permanently blocked from creating its first project. Verified LIVE on stage post-deploy: project create (prj_87830ed) + environment create (env_3fcfe) succeed, and the U11 optimistic archive persists (DELETE→200). Adjacent findings logged in task-0128 'Adjacent findings': api-edge notifications facade missing (blocks U11 notif-prefs), console auth-hydration race (deep-link reload bounces to /login before token hydrates). PRIOR: Task 0127 (U11 Vercel-standard console) DONE — merged as PRs #204 (slice A: primitives Select/Tooltip/Sheet/Switch/Checkbox + mobile nav + extensible Cmd-K registry), #205 (slice B: usage & quota), #207 (slice C: account profile + org/project settings + optimistic archive). Spec scoped in #203. All browser-verified against live stage; main green (typecheck/lint/135 tests/next build). One U11 surface DEFERRED as backend-blocked: notification preferences — api-edge has no notifications facade (SDK methods exist but GET /v1/notifications/preferences returns not_found), so the console can't consume it; unblock = a /v1/notifications/* edge slice (see ai/deferred.md). The dependency-free Switch primitive is in place for that. Rename/update of org/project/env remains out (no API). B-track forward legs B1/B6/B10 still human-blocked; B9-console DEFERRED on a human architecture decision; P1 promote-flow likely next backend-leaning leg.
